headline: Jim Cramer Highlights Norwegian Cruise Line as a Strategic Target for Disney
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NYSE:NCLH) is one of the stocks in focus this week under Jim Cramer’s game plan. Cramer mentioned the company during the episode, as he said: Look out, Norwegian Cruise reports on Monday, and the activists at Elliott Management are after this company to start performing a little more like the […]
